# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  ECSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow inbound traffic on port 22
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
          FromPort: '22'
          ToPort: '22'
          Protocol: tcp

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Sub { Region: { Ref: 'AWS::Region' } }, AMI]
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroupIds: [!Ref ECSSecurityGroup]
      KeyName: my-key

  EBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    DependsOn: EC2Instance
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance.AvailabilityZone
      Size: '8'
      VolumeType: gp2

  EBSAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    DependsOn: EBSVolume
    Properties:
      Device: '/dev/sdh'
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      VolumeId: !Ref EBSVolume
